name: Donnell Rawlings
blurb: A longtime club and theater performer, he also appeared in The Wire and voiced a character in Pixar's Soul.
bio: Donnell Rawlings is an American stand-up comedian and actor from the Washington, D.C. area, best known as Ashy Larry and the host of the cast on Chappelle's Show. A longtime club and theater performer, he also appeared in The Wire and voiced a character in Pixar's Soul. His debut Netflix special, A New Day, was produced by Dave Chappelle in 2024.

timeline.ev: Joins the cast of Chappelle's Show
Appears as Day-Day on HBO's The Wire
Voices Dez in the Pixar film Soul
Netflix special A New Day premieres

accolades: Cast member of the landmark series Chappelle's Show
Debut Netflix special A New Day, produced by Dave Chappelle (2024)
Host of The Donnell Rawlings Show podcast
